_comment: Wang Family Village — Ancestral Hall (祠堂). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.1: 'ancestral hall, elders who speak of the lost generation.' Honors the Wang family lineage predating the Teng Huayuan massacre. Architecture: mossy stone bricks, dark oak logs, tile roof. Interior: spirit tablets (soul_sand + custom_name NBT), memorial plaques for the massacred Wang family members, central altar (chiseled_stone_bricks + soul_lantern).
name: ergenverse:wang_family_village_ancestral_hall/start_pool
